series_metadata.series_description: Per agency procedure number PROC002, Supervisors and Managers are required to maintain a time verification worksheet to document all spot checks of the start or end time of the employees assigned to them. Note:- (This schedule is not encompassed under,nor is it the same as, the general schedule GP-Pay-01).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from date of respective pay period ending date and ; Electronic: from date of respective pay period ending date and
